name: Evo
comment: EVO is a powerful and compact discharge moving head. SPOT and BEAM all in one with the fastest effects, including ‘Dyna Prism’. EVO features also the revolutionary ‘FPR’ system for an unlimited Pan rotation. EVO is versatile: thanks to its 440 W HRI LAMP (24,000 Lumens) and it's perfect in a range of applications, from TV studios to live concerts.
